HediffDef.label: unstable FEV exposure
HediffDef.description: An unrefined FEV dosage is tearing through this subject's body in violent, uneven waves. Their metabolism surges, tissues misfire, and the mind slips toward paranoia and collapse while the mutation struggles to take hold.

HediffDef.label: refined FEV exposure
HediffDef.description: A refined FEV strain is restructuring this subject with far more control, but the process is still brutal. Violent mood swings, intrusive aggression, and bouts of instability are common until the body either stabilizes or fails.

HediffDef.label: isolated FEV exposure
HediffDef.description: An isolated FEV culture is remaking this subject at the deepest biological level. The transformation is faster and cleaner than lesser strains, but the nervous system remains under immense pressure until the final mutation locks into place.

li.label: Master's Army
li.description: This super mutant slave exists to serve in the Master's Army, and takes grim pride in that purpose.
